Dakoit Coin Purse  
 

Lore Item
WT: 0.1 Weight Reduction: 10%
Capacity: 8 Size Capacity: TINY
Dakoit Coin Purse
Lore Item
WT: 0.1 Weight Reduction: 10%
Capacity: 8 Size Capacity: TINY

Item Type:Container
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Tavarien Rainshadow
Lucy Entry By:Yeowow
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-15 18:42:56
Page Updated:Sat Mar 17th, 2018

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 50pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 15
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

The Field of Bone
NPC Name
Iksar Dakoit

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Crescent Reach (Removed)
Quest Name
Container Tokens

The Bazaar (Removed)
Quest Name
Container Tokens

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
The Field of Bone
Also reduces the weight of coin carried by 10%


Uploaded July 2nd, 2018 by Nniki
Send a correction
Post Comment
Trash
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2024 at 11:48 AM Rating: Good
Erekai
Sage
71 posts
lmao this thing is so bad, even during live Kunark days and before the DPG store and before bag bundles, this thing is bad. Anything that can even fit in it ("TINY") wouldn't even be heavy anyway so the 10% WR is pointless. 8 slots for 0.1 wt seems good for Monks, but then again, it can only fit TINY things in it. Not to mention, this mob is hella rare too. It's just so funny to me how poorly items were designed back then, especially for being this rare. Cracks me up.
▲ Page top
The head
QuoteReply
# May 11 2002 at 9:28 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253209609
3 posts
So... Anyone know what the head is for?
▲ Page top
Just got one
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2001 at 4:29 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591766783790
25 posts
Was zoning in from EJ and decided to take a look around for the elusive Diakot. Ran around for about five seconds (in the are between Kaesora and Kurns, much closer to Kaesora) before finding him. Killed him in a few hits and damn near messed my pants when I looted and saw the bag. (Made up for losing my level.)
It IS 0.1 weight, btw. Only the second time I've seen the *******; First time I was level 13 or so and saw him wander by Kurns, and had NO idea what a rare spawn I had just narrowly avoided getting killed by.

--Slathgar Ebonscale, 36th Monk of Xev
▲ Page top
Weigth is wrong
QuoteReply
# May 25 2001 at 8:47 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I have one of these so I know for a fact that the weight is 0.1 not 0.0, doesn't matter much, I just thought I would correct it.

The iksar dakoit is a very rare spawn found around kurns tower, and the one I killed was lvl 15.

It does reduce the weight of things carried in it ( I tested with a giant grub digger which for some reason is tiny ??? ).
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# May 22 2001 at 3:13 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I'm trying to hunt the Dakoit Bandit right now but haven't had any luck in like 6 hours. I've been killing all the Iksar Bandits I can find in FOB hoping it will spawn. Does anyone have any new information on the Dakoit Bandit? Verant didn't nerf it did they?

hey tiladan
QuoteReply
# May 20 2001 at 3:37 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Tiladan, your thinking of the tiny coin purse, i have that, its a 2 slot 20% weight reduction to coins and items inside -- this one is 10%, its different

where does ti spawn
QuoteReply
# May 13 2001 at 1:56 PM Rating: Default
Tassoth
574 posts
As the subject sez where does this mob spawn or what is its trigger. I was in the FoB for 14 lvls with my monk & I am now there with my Necro, I have never seen the mob at all ??? The coin purse would be great for my Monk ( who is constantly poor coz of the wgt restrictions) Any help would be great :)
____________________________
The Real Iksar

Madho
Novocane
Poldarn
▲ Page top
RE: where does ti spawn
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 10:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762955668
21 posts
Tassoth, something you might want to consider: Speak with a shaman. They can get Spirit Pouch spell at level 9 (I think, I didn't buy it 'till 19th). It's a 4 slot bag with %100 weight reduction. I give 'em out to any monk I group with now.

They're no-rent, which means if you put anything in 'em and then go LD (or log out) for a while (a long while, not 35 seconds) you'll lose the bag and its contents.

If you're on Sullon Zek, look up Kirsk, and I'll hook you up. (assuming I'm in a good mood)
▲ Page top
RE: where does ti spawn
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2004 at 6:09 PM Rating: Decent
Mikimaru
106 posts
how do you put the money in the spirit pouch?

Mikimaru Ownzall

Tarew Marr

dakoit
QuoteReply
# May 01 2001 at 5:22 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
dakoits head... what is it for?
▲ Page top
Have One
QuoteReply
# Feb 19 2001 at 11:30 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Ok, here's my experiance with the Coin Purse. At level 13 or so I was with a lower level, someone called "Dakoit in newbie area!" in FoB. We ran to it, and with a little help from my roommate, killed it. I won the roll, and have had it ever since. It seems to be a 10% wieght reduction to your COIN wieght, I've never really verified this exactly, but it usually knocks 2 or 3 lbs off me when I'm full of loot. I have not verified any wieght reduction to what's inside it, since it doesn't fit large objects, I've just been putting words and such in there. Also, that is the only time I've ever seen or heard of Iksar Dakoit in FoB. I've never seen another coin purse. I'm going to bring a char with tracking in to FoB soon to attempt some more. I'll also get a stack of metal bits or somesuch to see if it drops the wieght of those at all, again, it doesn't hold much.
▲ Page top
RE: Have One
QuoteReply
# Feb 22 2002 at 10:37 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591767079068
Sage
266 posts
Try putting a block of ore in it. It fits in medium slots, and is VERY heavy. You should see a difference.

affirmitive on that iksar dakoit lvl 15 to maybe 17 i got one myself this spawn is extremely rare and the drop is even rarer, the poouch goes for 1000-1500pp weight is 0.0 weight reduction is 20% and can hold 2 tiny items inside pouch
